g.title: system_planes
g.text: Three strongly-isolated planes. Every edge is an allowed crossing; the barred red edge is a path that structurally does not exist.

g.title: PUMP
g.text: validate in sandboxed parser, continuously fuzzed

g.title: DBUS->ORCH
g.text: no bus/store shared, no inbound connection
a guest escape reaches nothing trusted
